subject: Remove growth assumption from one-time license model
body:
Remove unitsSoldPerMonth input to align with static unit economics philosophy.
The model now shows only current maintenance revenue from existing customers,
without projecting future license sales.

Changes:
- Removed unitsSoldPerMonth input field
- Revenue now only from existing maintenance contracts
- Costs only from supporting existing customers
- Still provides pricing guidance (min/max/equilibrium) for licenses

This makes the one-time model consistent with other models which use
current-state snapshots rather than growth projections.
title: Remove growth assumption from one-time license model
